info.name: Japan Project - Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection with Admin and User routes separated. Uses {{adminBaseUrl}} for admin routes and {{userBaseUrl}} for user routes.

exec: body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: pm.environment.get('adminEmail'), password: pm.environment.get('adminPassword') }) }

item.name: Admin Routes
item.description: All routes under /api/v1/admin/*. Requires admin authentication.

item.name: User Routes
item.description: All routes under /api/v1/user/*. Public and authenticated user routes.
